Register foreign employees with the SAIME (Administrative Service for Identification, Migration and Foreigners)
Ensure passports and residence permits are current
documentation_required: Work contract stamped by the Ministry of Labor
compliance_risk: Potential deportation of the employee, suspension of business license, and significant legal penalties for the employer.
penalty: Fines indexed to the Tax Unit and potential criminal liability for illegal employment practices.

law_name: Constitution of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela
definition: Establishes that all persons are equal before the law and prohibits discrimination based on race, gender, creed, social status, or any other condition that tends to nullify or impair the recognition of rights.
compliance_requirements: Ensure equality of opportunity in hiring and promotion processes
Maintain non-discriminatory policies in all workplace interactions
compliance_risk: Constitutional challenge or legal nullity of discriminatory acts
penalty: Civil liability and potential administrative sanctions for human rights violations
source_reference: Official Gazette No. 5.908 Extraordinary dated February 19, 2009

definition: Prohibits all forms of discrimination, distinction, exclusion, or preference in employment based on race, sex, age, marital status, trade union affiliation, religion, political opinion, nationality, sexual orientation, or disability.
compliance_requirements: Guarantee equal pay for equal work regardless of gender or personal status
Eliminate discriminatory practices in training and advancement
Refrain from requesting pregnancy tests as a condition for hiring
documentation_required: Standardized payroll reporting evidencing equal pay
compliance_risk: Sanctions by the Ministry of Labor and mandatory re-hiring or compensation for victims
penalty: Administrative fines ranging from 30 to 120 tax units, potential court-ordered indemnity
source_reference: Official Gazette No. 6.076 Extraordinary dated May 7, 2012

law_name: Organic Law on the Right of Women to a Life Free of Violence
law_code: Ley Orgánica sobre el Derecho de las Mujeres a una Vida Libre de Violencia
definition: Protects women against harassment, workplace violence, and discrimination, including sexual harassment in the professional and academic environment.
compliance_requirements: Implement protocols to prevent and address sexual harassment at work
Create safe channels for reporting complaints
Designate an office or representative for harassment prevention
compliance_risk: High administrative and criminal liability for the employer
penalty: Fines, mandatory public apologies, and criminal prosecution for managers involved

law_name: Ley Orgánica del Sistema de Seguridad Social
definition: The obligation to contribute to the IVSS (Instituto Venezolano de los Seguros Sociales) to cover sickness, maternity, disability, and pension risks.
compliance_requirements: Register employer and employees with the IVSS
Make monthly payroll contributions
Report all salary changes
compliance_risk: Loss of benefits for employees and significant fines for the employer.
penalty: Fines proportional to the number of non-registered employees and potential criminal liability for evasion.

law_name: Ley del Régimen Prestacional de Vivienda y Hábitat
definition: Mandatory contributions to the Compulsory Housing Savings Fund (FAOV) aimed at financing employee housing access.
compliance_requirements: Register in the FAOV system (BANAVIH)
Withhold 1% of employee salary
Employer contribution of 2% of employee salary
compliance_risk: Administrative sanctions by BANAVIH.
penalty: Fines of 10% to 50% of the unpaid amounts plus interest.

law_name: Ley Orgánica del Trabajo, los Trabajadores y las Trabajadoras (LOTTT) - Profit Sharing
definition: The requirement for companies to distribute at least 15% of their annual net profits among their employees (Utilidades).
compliance_requirements: Calculate 15% of net profit
Distribute according to the number of days worked
Ensure a minimum of 30 days and maximum of 120 days of salary
documentation_required: Income tax return (ISLR) to determine net profits
Calculation report of profit sharing distribution
compliance_risk: Labor litigation and intervention by the Ministry of Labor.
penalty: Mandatory payment of owed amounts plus fines and possible closure of the company in severe cases.
source_reference: Ministerio del Poder Popular para el Proceso Social de Trabajo

law_name: Ley Orgánica del Trabajo, los Trabajadores y las Trabajadoras (LOTTT) - Vacation Bonus
definition: The obligation to pay a vacation bonus equivalent to at least 15 days of salary plus one extra day for each year of service.
compliance_requirements: Grant paid vacation leave after one year of service
Pay the legal vacation bonus in addition to salary for those days
compliance_risk: Administrative fines during labor audits.
penalty: Fines ranging from 30 to 120 tax units.
source_reference: Ministerio del Poder Popular para el Proceso Social de Trabajo

law_name: Organic Law of Labor and Workers (LOTTT)
definition: Mandates the requirement for employers to maintain a payroll register indicating the salary, hours worked, and overtime for all workers.
compliance_requirements: Maintain an updated payroll register
Record all remuneration details
Ensure data accuracy for social benefits calculations
compliance_risk: Fines, labor inspections, and potential claims for unpaid benefits due to lack of accurate records.
penalty: Administrative fines ranging from 30 to 360 tax units depending on severity.

law_name: Law of the Integrated Social Security System
definition: Regulates the mandatory registration and contribution of employers to the IVSS, requiring monthly payroll updates for employee status.
compliance_requirements: Register employer and employees in IVSS system
Report salary changes
Submit monthly contribution declarations (TIUNA system)
compliance_risk: Late payment interests, suspension of social security benefits for employees, administrative fines.
penalty: Fines calculated based on tax units, potential closure of establishment.

law_name: Organic Law of the Tax Code
definition: Governs the obligation to report and withhold Income Tax (ISLR) from employee salaries and report those amounts to the SENIAT.
compliance_requirements: Calculate withholding tax on annual basis (ARC form)
Monthly reporting of withheld amounts
Issue annual withholding certificates
compliance_risk: Tax audits, high interest penalties, and criminal tax evasion charges for gross non-compliance.
penalty: Fines based on the amount of tax not withheld or paid, plus default interest.

law_name: Law of the Housing and Habitat Regime
definition: Obligates employers to report and pay compulsory contributions for the Housing and Habitat Savings Fund based on monthly payroll.
compliance_requirements: Registration in the FAOV/FAVV system
Monthly submission of payroll data through the FAOV portal
Timely contribution payment
compliance_risk: Fines for late reporting and interest on outstanding contributions.
penalty: Administrative fines in tax units.

law_name: Organic Law on Prevention, Conditions and Work Environment (LOPCYMAT)
definition: Requires reporting of payroll-related data regarding the hazardous nature of work for the calculation of the recreational and risk-based social contributions.
compliance_requirements: Report average salary for contribution purposes
Maintain payroll records for safety inspections
compliance_risk: Severe administrative sanctions including business closure.
penalty: Fines ranging from 75 to 100 tax units per violation.

law_name: Ley Orgánica del Trabajo, los Trabajadores y las Trabajadoras
definition: Requires every employer to keep a labor registry containing details of all employees, including their salary, start date, and positions held.
compliance_requirements: Maintain a log of all employees
Record updated information on personnel
Keep records available for labor inspection
documentation_required: Labor Registry (Libro de Control de Trabajo)
compliance_risk: Fines and inability to prove employment status during litigation.
penalty: Administrative fines determined by the Ministry of Labor.

definition: Mandates the registration of all employees with the IVSS within 3 days of hiring.
compliance_requirements: Register employer with IVSS
Register each new employee with IVSS
Maintain contribution records
compliance_risk: Fines, legal liability for benefits not covered, and obstruction of employer activities.
penalty: Monetary fines and possible closure of business.

law_name: Ley Orgánica de Prevención, Condiciones y Medio Ambiente de Trabajo
definition: Requires the registration of the employer and the establishment of health and safety records for employees.
compliance_requirements: Register the company with INPSASEL
Notify all work-related accidents
Maintain health records
compliance_risk: Severe administrative fines and potential criminal liability for accidents.
penalty: High fines ranging from 20 to 100 tax units (UT) depending on severity.

law_name: Ley del Régimen Prestacional de Vivienda y Hábitat
definition: Mandates employer registration and employee enrollment into the Mandatory Housing Savings Fund.
compliance_requirements: Register employer with FAOV
Enroll all employees
Monthly payroll contribution reporting
compliance_risk: Accumulated interest on unpaid contributions and potential fines.
penalty: Administrative fines based on contribution value.
